title: Dependencies starting with a future date moving backwards
excerpt: Is there a way to set-up dependencies based on a future date moving backwards?  We currently want to set a Live date and set dependencies moving backwards to show us how much lead time we need. Can this be accomplished? …

posts.author: cholmgren (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to set-up dependencies based on a future date moving backwards? We currently want to set a Live date and set dependencies moving backwards to show us how much lead time we need. Can this be accomplished? From what I can see we can only use dependencies moving forward and not backwards.

Example:
Live Day = April 15th
Materials due = Live day - 5 business days
Training = Live day - 15 business days

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @cholmgren

Unfortunately monday does not support backward planning or holiday blackouts. The good news is that the Scheduler Pro app from Work Perfect is supporting all of that. See https://monday.com/marketplace/10000139
